title: Reading and Use of English - Part 4
description: For questions 25 – 30, complete the second sentence so that it has a similar meaning to the first sentence, using the word given. Do not change the word given. You must use between two and five words, including the word given. Here is an example (0).

example.firstSentence: He started a new photography project last month.
example.secondSentence: He (1) _________ a new photography project last month.

questions.firstSentence: They are interviewing all the candidates today.
This is the best pizza I've ever eaten.
The traffic was so bad that I missed the meeting.
questions.secondSentence: There was (1) _________ that I missed the meeting.

questions.firstSentence: She was able to solve the difficult puzzle in the end.
questions.secondSentence: She (1) _________ the difficult puzzle in the end.

questions.firstSentence: She asked him to help carry the boxes.
I'm certain he has done the homework.
